name: White Mushroom Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Fresh mushrooms sliced evenly (try an egg slicer)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the sliced mushrooms and cook until they are golden brown.
3. Stir in the white wine, parsley, salt, and pepper. Cook for 10 minutes on medium heat.
4. Remove from heat and stir in the heavy cream.
5. Serve hot over cooked and drained pasta with grated cheese on the side.
